name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Changed

- UniBridge_BatchActions now appends active UniBridge_WorkSession review data after executing batches by default, so agents immediately see changed-file counts, risks, and sample paths when a WorkSession is active.
- UniBridge_ExecutionStatus Snapshot/Recent now includes an active WorkSession review summary by default.

### Previous Changes

- Added UniBridge_WorkSession for project-local AI work-session checkpoints. Agents can begin a session, review changed files, inspect compact text diffs, dry-run selected reverts, and execute explicit file restores/deletes from snapshots stored under Library/UniBridge/WorkSessions.
- ToolGuide, DomainCatalog, and Discover expose WorkSession as the recommended safety/review layer before and after broad AI edits.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
